name: Core Read Permission Contract Skeleton
description: Skeleton contract for Core read permission boundaries.
purpose: Defines the placeholder boundary for Core read permission semantics without evaluating access.
appliesTo: Textual Core permission contract boundary only.
owns: Core Read Permission Contract Skeleton boundary.
nonGoals: Executable permission evaluation, runtime authorization checks, or API guards.
RBAC, authentication, login, session, or authorization middleware behavior.
